availability: Open to new missions / roles starting Q2 2026.
values:
I care about: shipping AI systems that are auditable end-to-end (not 'trust me'), production over demos, picking the boring tool when it does the job, and writing the code an auditor or a junior teammate can actually read. I work best on a small senior team where the ratio of reviewers to producers stays sane.

Indicative rates: ~€800/day TJM freelance; ~€120–130k for the right CDI. Always negotiable in context.
red_flags: Java legacy stacks with no path to modernization
AI demos with no observability or evaluation plan
Greenfield rewrites whose only goal is the rewrite itself
Cultures where 'governance' means slideware, not enforcement
